DataRequest.Name: Excessive HTTP Server Side Errors / SCW
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Excessive server side error status $httpStatusCode in $incidentRptDevName
DataRequest.Remediation: Investigate the error codes and confirm why they are occurring.

SubPattern.name: excessive_server_error_codes
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: (eventType CONTAIN "IIS-" OR eventType CONTAIN "Apache-") AND (srcIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) OR httpForwardAddr IS NOT NULL) AND httpStatusCode IN ("500","501","502","503","504","505","506","507","508","510","511")
